title: Research Grants
summary: Funding for creators producing content on India's history, culture, and civilisational heritage.
description: SMaRT funds creators producing videos and content on pro-India topics — history, culture, heritage, and civilisational knowledge. Apply through the member portal after joining.
details: Investigative research grants for member portals
Editorial standards workshops in 10 Bharatiya languages
Fact-checking and source verification training
Civilisational studies curriculum for working journalists

title: Legal Support
summary: When platforms or adversaries try to silence you, SMaRT provides legal backing
description: A creator's voice should not cost them their livelihood. SMaRT provides legal advisory support when creators face notices, bans, or coordinated suppression.
details: Pooled advertising and sponsorship inventory
Shared studio, equipment, and software access
Donor and CSR partner introductions
Revenue-sharing on translated and syndicated content

title: Literary & Cultural Presence
summary: Book launches, lit fest collaborations, and cultural events that put your work in front of the right audiences.
description: From co-hosting literary festivals to supporting book launches, SMaRT brings its members onto stages that matter
details: Coordinated multi-portal publishing on national stories
Cross-language translation pipeline
Social media swarm + creator-led distribution
Member directory and discoverability platform

title: Cultural Immersions
summary: Ashram retreats and temple tours — lived experiences of Bharat that no studio can replicate.
description: Ashram retreats and temple tours open to members. Designed to reconnect creators with Bharat's living heritage
details: Mentorship from senior journalists and editors
Workshops on content strategy and audience engagement
Training on digital tools and platforms
Access to a network of experienced creators

title: Amplification
summary: Coordinated reach across 650+ creators & authors and 400M+ audiences.
description: Issue briefs, editorial workshops, coordinated campaigns, and a network of 650+ creators ready to amplify what deserves to be heard.
details: Regular networking events and meetups
Collaboration opportunities with other members
Access to a community forum for idea exchange
Partnerships with industry experts and influencers
